main.description: Create a gate (hide message) on behalf of a streamer. Requires 'hide' permission. Creates a place.stream.chat.gate record in the streamer's repository.

messageUri.description: The AT-URI of the chat message to hide.

uri.description: The AT-URI of the created gate record.

cid.description: The CID of the created gate record.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.description: The request lacks valid authentication credentials.

errors.name: Forbidden
errors.description: The caller does not have permission to hide messages for this streamer.

errors.name: SessionNotFound
errors.description: The streamer's OAuth session could not be found or is invalid.
